detailed_description: This video captures a delightful and energetic toddler playing on a bed in a cozy bedroom setting. The toddler, dressed in a pink t-shirt and a patterned diaper, is seen engaging in various movements including standing, sitting, and excitedly jumping on the soft comforter. Throughout the clip, the child maintains a visibly joyful demeanor, frequently smiling and laughing, creating an atmosphere of pure childhood exuberance and fun.

segments.why_kept: This entire segment serves as the semantic core, demonstrating the toddler's energetic play (process/labor) and clear positive emotional climax (laughter and smiles) while interacting with the bed. The video's duration perfectly captures the full action and reaction without any extraneous frames, fulfilling the 'no-mistake' rule.
